decision: Live Claude Code hook-event evidence accepted for Phase 5 ASK/DENY activation in disposable evaluation repositories. No active source hooks/hooks.json was created.
observations: standard-ask: PreToolUse Edit outside currentUnit.allowedPaths emitted permissionDecision ask with reason COW E2.
production-deny: PreToolUse Edit of a tracked source file during diagnosis-readonly emitted permissionDecision deny with reason COW E1.
Both accepted live runs completed through Claude Code stream-json with hook_response events and validated run records.
External fixture checks confirmed the blocked target files were unchanged; only evaluation-only hooks.json remained untracked in disposable repos.

The E1 live run exposed Git safe.directory ownership behavior in disposable repos; cow-hook now uses per-command safe.directory for read-only Git classification and tests cover inherited Git env/path edge cases.
